next_steps: Serum anti-insulin receptor antibody titer testing
Serum IGF-1 and growth hormone level measurement
Comprehensive autoimmune panel (e.g., anti-dsDNA, anti-Smith, complement levels)
Genetic testing for lipodystrophy-associated mutations (e.g., AGPAT2, BSCL2, CAV1, PTRF)
Consultation with rheumatology and endocrinology for management of suspected autoimmune-mediated lipodystrophy
